occupation: VP Brazil - Country Lead at Perion
headline: VP Brazil - Country Lead
summary:
Expertise in digital marketing, programmatic media, strategic partnerships, and sales strategy.
Proven track record in successfully achieving quota and implementing new business opportunities.
A result-oriented professional with a creative and entrepreneurial attitude toward business.
Innovation-driven background with exceptional ability to stay current with new Technology.
Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic, and competitive environment.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Advertising and Technology professional with nearly 20 years of sales experience. Over the last decade, it has sharpened the mixed-channel advertisement ecosystem (online and offline), working with complementary media strategies across all customer journeys, such as Mobile, DOOH, CTV, Native, and Affiliates. 

I am a dual citizen (Brazilian and European), multilingual person who is an enthusiast for digital platforms. I have a deep comprehension of the Programmatic (12 years experience) and Mobile Ad Tech (9 years experience) environments.

experiences.company: ABOOH - Associação Brasileira de Out of Home
experiences.title: Member Board of Directors
Sr Sales Account Director
experiences.description:
· Responsible for growing CPG (Food & Beverages industries) books of business, developed pipeline, and always executed governance with strategic plans to deliver quota.
· Act as a strategic digital consultant, responsible for supporting advertiser's business goals by driving opportunities through Yahoo solutions.
· Educate advertisers on leveraging their communication and marketing strategies by delivering insights on omnichannel solutions throughout programmatic media products (e.g., Display, Video, Native, Connected TV, DOOH, Audio, X-Box gaming).
· Support advertisers and agencies in optimization and reports to scale results and drive campaigns' best performance in partnership with the accounting management team.
· Build strong relationships with key decision makers, guiding them through planning processes and identifying the best solutions to achieve their business KPIs.

experiences.title: Senior Business Development Manager Latam
experiences.description: Verve Group is unifying recent Media and Games Invest acquisitions; Verve, the location-based mobile marketing platform based in New York and Carlsbad (CA), PubNative, a global mobile ad exchange, and Applift, a global mobile growth performance marketing expert, both of the latter two based in Berlin. All three companies are unified under the Verve Group brand. By consolidating the teams and platforms, the three well- established mobile AdTech companies within the Media and Games Invest (MGI) Group focus on joining forces and moving forward together under one advertising platform.

experiences.title: (Applift Former) Senior Business Development Manager Latam
experiences.description: Applift a Verve Group company is a mobile user growth expert that powers brands and businesses to connect with and activate customers with its unique full-funnel approach. Our managed service platform combines access to the world’s largest data platforms, ad exchanges, publishers, and mobile attribution partners. Combined with its proprietary campaign optimization algorithms it delivers unparalleled results for advertisers across the globe.

experiences.title: Sales Manager Brazil
experiences.description: Primary duties: Responsible for connecting brands through digital multiplatform companies such as Snapchat, Twitch.tv, EA Sports Mobile, and Activision Blizzard (KING – Candy Crush).  By direct contact with brands and relationship with agencies. Additionally, managing weekly business meetings with internal partners/decision-makers to align pipeline, prospects, opportunities, and strategies across all Brazilian markets. Top clients, L’oreal, Coca-Cola, Ambev, Governo/BSB, RedBull, Arcor, Banco do Brasil, Mondelez, Universal Pictures, and others.

experiences.title: Senior Account Executive
experiences.description: Main duties: Responsible for serving advertising agencies and direct clients. Relationship with agencies TOP 30 Brazil, like DPZT, F / Nazca, FBiz, Myagencia, Dentsu Group, Y&R, Wunderman, RGA, and others.

experiences.title: Mobile Advertising Sales Manager
experiences.description:
Main Duties: A leader in team management of sales accounts executives supporting them to analyze and identify the business goals and objectives and implements and enforce the strategies of the company to achieve profitable results.

Responsible for a prospect and arrange a meeting with both current and new customers. – Sales Presentations, varying from one-on-one sessions to large groups in events. – Creating/Revising proposals, managing campaigns from concept to completion, providing full post-campaign analysis and reports. – Negotiation and closing deals. – Provide market intelligence and understanding industry and market trends. High knowledge of Salesforce platform (CRM).

experiences.title: Sales Senior Executive – Press, Digital Media, Mobile And Social Media
experiences.description: Account executive responsible for advertising agencies services by developing and managing advertising needs of all platforms such as Magazines, Web sites, Mobiles, Tablets, Events and Brand Content.

experiences.title: Sales Executive – Press, Digital Media, Mobile And Social Media
experiences.description:
Attendance to publicity agencies and direct clients in various business  segments.
Commercialization of publicity spaces in the media.
Monthly and weekly magazines, event support. Media  digital | sites (muitiplatforms).
Elaboration of Commercial proposal, client  negotiation.
Experience on the management  of  the client  identity and management  of new business  prospective, and periodic visit  achievements with a large market vision, evaluations of clients  and  competitors.
Commercial partnership with the objective to expand ,focusing in goals and objectives for the company.

experiences.title: General Store Manager
experiences.description:
Responsible for direct commercial group actions to raise productivity and reach the goals and objectives.
Establish direction and stage sequence that secures commercial actions, as well as an adequate distribution of resources to achieve objectives and goals.
Estimate capacity, support the learning and development of people focusing the performance on results and behavior. Staff with 5 employees and 3 more servers.
Develop work in a collaborative way, recognizing and respecting people limitations, helping to overcome and stimulating the work as a group.
Individual feedback conductor, pointing criticism and motivating the group.
Strategist to achieve monthly and quarterly goals creating positive income for the company. Accumulated income in the year in 172% above the objective.

experiences.title: Senior Account Executive
experiences.description:
Management of 500 clients with high salaries.
Identify opportunities to increase profitability for the Institution.
Product sales and services as the necessity of the clients.
Responsible for the office in the absence of the manager.

experiences.title: Vice President of Sales Brazil
experiences.description:
As Vice President for Brazil, I lead the expansion and establishment of Hivestack in these markets. I oversee all aspects of the business to ensure sustainable growth and long-term success.

> Launching and structuring operations from the ground up, managing Finance, Legal, Marketing, Sales, HR, Training, and Customer Service with international support.
> Building and leading high-performance teams, fostering a culture of agility, collaboration, and problem-solving in fast-paced, evolving markets.
> Navigating complex regulatory, financial, and operational landscapes, adapting global strategies to local market dynamics.
> Developing and executing go-to-market strategies, establishing a strong local presence to accelerate growth and market penetration.
> Aligning cross-functional teams, ensuring seamless collaboration between Sales, Operations, Finance, and HR to drive efficiency and scalability.
> Forging key strategic partnerships, both locally and globally, to enhance market positioning and unlock new business opportunities.

Expanding a company into new markets goes beyond sales—it's about building something from scratch, overcoming challenges, adapting to different business environments, and creating a solid foundation for long-term success.
